comment: Reason-code bindings: internal code -> ECOA adverse-action notice text (verbatim, HR-10) + HMDA denial reason code + category. Every rule on_fail.reason_code MUST exist here (FR-POL-4).

RC-DTI-EXCESSIVE.ecoa_text: Income insufficient for amount of credit requested; excessive obligations in relation to income

RC-INCOME-HISTORY.ecoa_text: Length or stability of income history insufficient

RC-CREDIT-HISTORY.ecoa_text: Derogatory credit history including bankruptcy, foreclosure, or recent mortgage delinquency

RC-LTV-EXCESSIVE.ecoa_text: Value or type of collateral not sufficient for the loan amount requested

RC-PROPERTY-INELIGIBLE.ecoa_text: Collateral property type not eligible for this program

RC-ASSETS-UNSOURCED.ecoa_text: Unable to verify source of funds for down payment or reserves

RC-DATA-MISSING.ecoa_text: Credit application incomplete; required information not provided

RC-LIMIT-EXCEEDED.ecoa_text: Loan amount requested exceeds program limits
